toast.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
toast.genericError: The operation could not be completed.

auth.brandHeadline: Smart financial control for your business.
auth.brandSubtitle: Centralize accounts, transactions and reports in a single vault — with the clarity your company needs to grow.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.protected: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start organizing your company's finances in minutes.
register.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and accept the

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a link to reset your password.
forgot.sentSubtitle: We've sent instructions to reset your password.
forgot.sentBodySuffix: , you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgot.noEmailSubtitle: This server does not send e-mails.
forgot.noEmailBody: E-mail delivery is not configured on this instance. If you run the server, the reset link is written to the log (docker compose logs app) or use the reset command in the terminal. Otherwise, ask the instance administrator.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password to access your account.
reset.invalidSubtitle: We couldn't identify the reset token.
reset.invalidBody: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new password recovery link.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.subtitle: Confirming your finance.sh account.
verify.verifyingText: Please wait a moment while we validate your link.
verify.successText: Your account is verified. You can now access the platform securely.
verify.errorText: The link may have expired or already been used.
verify.missingText: No verification token was provided. Use the link sent to your email.

errors.nameMin: Please enter your full name (min. 2 characters).
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.orgNameMin: Please enter the organization name (min. 2 characters).

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.loadError: Could not load the dashboard. Check your connection and try again.

topCategories.title: Top categories
topCategories.subtitle: Expenses this month
topCategories.emptyDescription: This month's transactions will appear grouped here.

upcomingBills.title: Upcoming bills
upcomingBills.subtitle: Next payments
upcomingBills.emptyDescription: No bills due at the moment.

accountsSummary.title: Your accounts
accountsSummary.subtitle: Balance by account
accountsSummary.emptyDescription: Add an account to start recording transactions.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Progress toward your objectives
goals.emptyDescription: Create goals to track your objectives.

creditCards.title: Credit cards
creditCards.subtitle: Limit usage
creditCards.emptyDescription: Add cards to track their limits.

forecast.title: Cash forecast
forecast.subtitle: Next 3 months
forecast.negativeWarning: Projected balance is negative in some month of the period.
forecast.positiveNote: Projected balance is positive throughout the period.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, organization and preferences.

appearance.title: Theme and privacy
appearance.subtitle: Customize the appearance and how values are shown.
appearance.valuesHint: Hide monetary values on screen. Saved on this device.

edition.title: finance.sh
edition.description: 100% open-source, self-hosted. No limits on users, organizations or transactions, and no paid editions.

export.title: Export data
export.subtitle: Download your data in Excel, PDF or CSV.

danger.title: End session
danger.subtitle: You'll need to sign in again to access the dashboard.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Interface language. Saved on this device.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.subtitle: Welcome to finance.sh. Let's create the first user and your organization.

user.title: Administrator
user.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Use the generator for a strong password.

org.title: Organization
org.hint: The primary currency sets the default display format. You can change it later.

review.title: Review
review.notice: This is the platform's first account. It will have full access and can create more users later.

errors.already_initialized: The platform has already been set up. Please sign in to continue.
errors.weak_password: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Could not complete setup. Please try again.
errors.emptyPassword: Fill or generate a password before copying.
errors.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Please select and copy manually.
